CH-NEW-DEVIATION.exact_quote: Buyer irrevocably waives every claim based on fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.
CH-NEW-DEVIATION.proposed_redline: Nothing in the no-reliance clause limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.

CH-COUNTER-1.exact_quote: Buyer assumes obligations listed only in an unsigned addendum. All other Seller liabilities remain excluded. Clerical schedule updates are circulated within 3 days, and post-closing claim notices are due within 60 days after discovery.
CH-COUNTER-1.proposed_redline: Buyer assumes only the liabilities expressly listed in Section 4, and all other liabilities of Seller are excluded unless Buyer expressly agrees in a signed amendment.

CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Buyer's obligation to close is conditioned on Seller's representations being true in all material respects, Seller's covenant compliance, receipt of required consents, and delivery of lien releases.
CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.proposed_redline: Buyer's obligation to close is conditioned on Seller's representations being true in all material respects, Seller's covenant compliance, receipt of required consents, delivery of lien releases, and no Material Adverse Effect having occurred with respect to the Purchased Assets or the acquired business before closing.

CH-REGRESSION.exact_quote: A disclosure schedule qualifies the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. For ease of administration, each schedule item is deemed disclosed for purposes of every representation and warranty wherever its relevance is reasonably apparent from the face of the schedule.
CH-REGRESSION.proposed_redline: A disclosure schedule qualifies only the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. No disclosure schedule qualifies any other representation or warranty unless that representation or warranty specifically references the schedule item.
